page.title: Your Civic Briefing
page.subtitle: Bills, representatives, and propositions ranked by what matters to your life — based on the signals you've shared.
page.browseAllAria: Browse all civic data — go to the data hub
page.noProfileTitle: Tell us what matters to you
page.noProfileBody: Onboarding takes about a minute and unlocks the personalized feed.

bills.title: Bills moving this week
bills.subtitle: Legislation ranked by relevance to your interests + life context.
bills.empty: No bills above your relevance threshold this week. Broaden your interests to see more.

reps.title: Your representatives
reps.subtitle: What the people who represent you are doing this week.
reps.empty: None of your representatives crossed the relevance threshold this week. Broaden your interests to see more.
reps.noDistrictsTitle: We need your address to find your reps
reps.noDistrictsBody: Add a primary address so we can match you to the people who represent you.

committees.title: Committees on your topics
committees.subtitle: Hearings + comment windows in your jurisdictions, ranked by topic match.

placeholder.body: Personalized committee briefings are coming soon. Until then, browse all legislative committees.
placeholder.comingSoonNote: We'll show hearings + open comment windows ranked for you once that signal pipeline ships.

propositions.title: Active propositions
propositions.subtitle: Ballot measures in your jurisdictions, ranked by what matters to you.
propositions.empty: No active propositions match your interests. Broaden your interests or check back closer to an election.

placeholder.body: Personalized proposition briefings are coming soon. Until then, browse all active ballot measures.
placeholder.comingSoonNote: We'll show ranked props with trusted-org endorsements here once that signal pipeline ships.

whyThis.toggleOpen: Why is this on my briefing?
whyThis.axisDirectMaterial: Touches your money, rights, health, or services.
whyThis.axisValuesAlignment: Aligns with topics you said you care about.
whyThis.axisActionability: Has a vote or comment window you can influence soon.
whyThis.placeholderFor745: We'll write you a plain-language sentence here once the LLM explanation pipeline ships.

repsWhyThis.axisChamberMatch: Sits in the chamber where the bills you care about are moving.
repsWhyThis.axisCommitteeMatch: Serves on committees that handle your topics.
repsWhyThis.axisActionAlignment: Recently moved on bills you care about.

stubs.counterFrame: The opposing position will show here once the counter-frame pipeline ships.
stubs.actionAffordances: Vote dates, comment windows, and contact buttons will surface here once that data lands.
